name: Create Story Plot Diagram Flipchart
description: Create a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart analyzing the plot of 'The Most Dangerous Game' by Richard Connell. The flipchart must include a title page with the author's name and the subtitle 'Plot Diagram', a Freytag's Pyramid diagram labeled with the five plot stages (Exposition, Rising Action, Climax, Falling Action, and Resolution), a page mapping specific story events involving Rainsford and Zaroff to these stages, and a 'Discussion' page with at least two discussion questions. Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/plot_diagram_dangerous_game.flipchart.
